results.result_notes: Source prints duplicate place 21; preserved as printed
Source skips place 32; preserved as printed

event_comments: 105 runners participated in the 3rd annual Adventure Run at St. Edward State Park. The morning fog lifted just before the 10am mass start, yielding perfect weather for a November race. The race consisted almost entirely of trails and grass, which was unusually firm due to the recent lack of rain. The course had 10 mandatory checkpoints, leading to a variety of route choices taken. Dan Hayes was the repeat winner from last year, taking 2 minutes off last year's winning time. The finish line menu of chili, soup, cornbread, and fruit was well-received by all the participants. Thanks go to Scott McCoubrey of Capitol Hill FootZone for sponsoring the race.
result_source_brief: Web Snapshot: Adventure Run - St. Edward State Park (2000-11-19)
